summary: Phase 32 - Verified admin.py refactoring: All datetime.now().isoformat() replaced with get_now(). Fixed 3 pre-existing return type annotation bugs. All admin APIs working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: get_now() helper function correctly returns datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
60 usages of get_now() in admin.py for ISO string timestamps (including helper definition)
0 usages of datetime.now().isoformat() remaining - all replaced
Fixed 3 pre-existing return type annotation bugs: get_pending_products, get_pending_food_products, get_sub_admins (-> dict changed to -> list)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 32 refactoring verified: All datetime.now().isoformat() calls replaced with get_now() helper in admin.py. 60 get_now() usages, 0 datetime.now().isoformat() remaining. Fixed 3 return type annotation bugs (-> dict to -> list for endpoints returning lists). All admin APIs tested: settings, platform-status, pending sellers/drivers/products, stats, sub-admins, platform-wallet, call-requests, emergency-help, rejected-requests, orders, food-products, users.
